ideas.name: 你画我猜AI版
ideas.desc: AI画图你来猜，或者你画AI猜
ideas.desc_en: AI draws you guess, or you draw AI guesses
ideas.desc_ja: AIが描いてあなたが当てる
ideas.detail:
实现：图像生成API + 图像识别API + 计分系统
场景：聚会游戏、亲子互动
技术：Python + DALL-E + CLIP
ideas.detail_en:
Approach: Image generation + recognition + scoring
Use cases: Party games, family fun
Tech: Python + DALL-E + CLIP

Approach: LLM dynamic story + state management + saves
Use cases: Commute, bedtime stories
Tech: Python + LLM API + State machine
